title: Audit and fix contact form email address (sv.couverture95@gmail.com) in all mailto links and form fields

requirements.summary: Audit and correct all email addresses and mailto: links throughout the frontend to ensure they use exactly 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com'
acceptanceCriteria: Every mailto: href in Contact.tsx, Footer.tsx, and any other component uses exactly 'mailto:sv.couverture95@gmail.com' with no typos, extra spaces, or alternate addresses.
The contact form 'Envoyer' / submit button or form action opens a mailto: link pre-filled with sv.couverture95@gmail.com as the recipient.
The email displayed as text/link in the Contact section info card shows 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' and its href is 'mailto:sv.couverture95@gmail.com'.
The email displayed as text/link in the Footer shows 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' and its href is 'mailto:sv.couverture95@gmail.com'.
No other email address appears anywhere in the site components.
A test click on any email link opens a mail client with sv.couverture95@gmail.com as the pre-filled recipient.

file_operations.description: Audit and correct all email references in the Contact component: (1) Verify the email info card displays 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' as text and uses 'mailto:sv.couverture95@gmail.com' as the href. (2) Ensure the contact form submit button or form action uses a mailto: link targeting 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' with appropriate subject/body parameters. (3) Replace any incorrect, missing, or mismatched email addresses with the correct value.

Audit and correct the email link in the Footer component: Verify the email is displayed as 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' and the href is exactly 'mailto:sv.couverture95@gmail.com'. Replace any incorrect or malformed email addresses.
